surface_verification.justification: Hygiene scrub of tracked content (planning docs, an installer comment, a test fixture string, and the triage backlog log) — no user-experienceable surface (web/cli/api) and no functional code behavior touched. Verified via ruff, the installer shell-test suite (incl. the spaced-path tokenization regression), artifact-path-canon, JSONL validity of triage.jsonl, and the F0 isolation leak-guard. Full monorepo suite runs as the authoritative gate on the PR.

behaviors.behavior: Installer alias still tokenizes a space-containing REPO_ROOT into single --plugin-dir args after the fixture path was de-PII'd (kept a space)
triage.jsonl remains valid JSONL after the in-place path scrub (every line still parses)
behaviors.evidence: in-place json.loads validation over all lines during the scrub; git diff shows only the 3 PII-bearing lines changed

behaviors.behavior: No machine-local path / PII (Windows user-home, company name, maintainer email) remains in tracked files
behaviors.evidence: git grep for the user-home path, company name, and maintainer email patterns across tracked files (excl. gitignored Spec/) returns empty; the only remaining maintainer-name hits are intentional LICENSE/author attribution

behaviors.behavior: Generated/tracked artifact paths stay canonical (no bare legacy paths) after the scrub
